title: Late Checkout Not Possible
description: A guest requests a very late checkout on a day the room is needed for an arriving guest.

guestPersona.name: Mr. Abara
guestPersona.description: Guest with a late evening flight, hoping to keep the room most of the day

objectives.label: Explain the room is booked for an arriving guest that afternoon
Decline the very late checkout politely
Offer luggage storage and a day-use lounge as an alternative
Confirm the guest is satisfied with the solution

systemContext: Your flight doesn't leave until 10 p.m. and you'd like to keep your room until late afternoon instead of the standard 11 a.m. checkout. Unfortunately the room is already booked for an arriving guest that same afternoon, so a very late checkout isn't possible today. You are reasonable — if the receptionist explains this clearly and offers to store your luggage and let you use the lounge or pool for the day, you're satisfied with that solution.
openingLine: Mi vuelo no sale hasta las diez de la noche. ¿Sería posible quedarme en la habitación hasta última hora de la tarde?
